ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the crop */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop */,
  "growth_period" TEXT /* Typical growth period of the crop */,
  "optimal_climate" TEXT /* Optimal climate conditions for the crop */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Optimal soil type for the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "crop_code" TEXT /* Reference to the crop code */,
  "num_pixels_wi_zone" INTEGER /* Number of pixels indicating crop health within the zone */,
  "year_from" INTEGER /* Start year of data collection */,
  "year_to" INTEGER /* End year of data collection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location ID */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the satellite imagery */,
  "health_indicator" TEXT /* General health indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_crop_code FOREIGN KEY ("crop_code") REFERENCES crops ("crop_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the crops are grown */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type at the location */,
  "irrigation_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "crop_code" TEXT /* Reference to the crop code */,
  "predicted_yield" REAL /* Predicted yield for the crop */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the prediction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location ID */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the yield prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the yield prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_crop_code FOREIGN KEY ("crop_code") REFERENCES crops ("crop_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location ID */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity recorded */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the weather data */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Average wind direction */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Average solar radiation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crop_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop data ID */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score calculated from pixel analysis */,
  "observations" TEXT /* Observations regarding crop health */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location ID */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the satellite imagery used for analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the health metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_health_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_health_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crop_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location ID */,
  "crop_code" TEXT /* Reference to the crop code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_crop_code FOREIGN KEY ("crop_code") REFERENCES crops ("crop_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
